description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style red sports car with a sleek, rounded body and an open-top cockpit. The front features a prominent vertical-bar chrome grille, giving it a classic racing appearance. The car has two visible brown bucket seats and a minimalist dashboard, with no roof or side windows. Its wheels are large with whitewall tires, and the rims appear simple and robust, suitable for a retro design. The side profile is smooth and uninterrupted, with no visible door handles or trim, emphasizing aerodynamic lines. The rear is clean and unadorned, with subtle tail lights and no visible exhaust pipes or spoiler.
description: A compact, vintage red sports car with an open cockpit, chrome grille, and whitewall tires. Its design is sleek, rounded, and minimalist, evoking classic racing aesthetics.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bold vertical-bar chrome grille, rounded hood, and both front wheels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth, uninterrupted body, open cockpit, and whitewall tires.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the clean, rounded back, two brown seats, and minimal rear detailing.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the open cockpit and streamlined bodywork.
attribute_wheel_design: solid black rims with whitewall tires, no visible spokes
